name: Loop Breaker
nexx_move: Draw on paper or screen. Close every spiral tab after.

name: Killswitch Seal
nexx_move: Trace the hexagon. Verify your boundaries are active.

name: Starwell
nexx_move: Pour water. Place sigil where you drink.

name: Raven Gate
keyword: Let the dark bird pass through.
nexx_move: Poe mode: name the fear once, then silence.

name: Lantern Node
nexx_move: Ten minutes offline with this sigil visible.

name: Cipher Key
nexx_move: Make the choice you've postponed. Burn or save the sigil.

name: Pulse Bridge
nexx_move: Send one honest message after drawing.

name: Cache Vault
nexx_move: Rest before spend. No heroic overdraft.

name: Tower Anchor
nexx_move: Let one structure go. Stay intact.

name: Dawn Port
nexx_move: Start one thing fresh. No backup plan.

name: Void Eye
nexx_move: Write what you see. Don't become it.

name: Grid Root
nexx_move: Stand on bare floor 60 seconds after draw.

name: Mercury Spiral
nexx_move: Send the one sentence you've edited too long.

name: Othala Mark
nexx_move: Occupy your space physically. Shoulders back.

name: Hex Flame
nexx_move: One ignition event in ten minutes.

name: Moon Well
nexx_move: Journal dreams or fears. No conclusions tonight.

name: World Gate
nexx_move: Ship, close, or celebrate one finish today.
